testcase.name: pickupOrder_withNullNotes_usesDefaultPickedUpMessage
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.022+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 picked up → COMPLETED

testcase.name: serveOrder_whenOrderServiceFails_throws502
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.049+01:00 ERROR 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Failed to update order order-123 status to COMPLETED in order-service: Connection refused

testcase.name: enqueue_whenSaveFails_swallowsException
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-10T11:35:24.064+01:00 ERROR 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Failed to save kitchen order order-123: serialization error 2026-05-10T11:35:24.065+01:00 ERROR 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Failed to enqueue order order-123: 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR "Redis write failed"
org.springframework.web.server.ResponseStatusException: 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR "Redis write failed" at testcase.name: getQueue_skipsOrderThatCannotBeDeserialized
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.071+01:00 WARN 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Could not deserialize order bad-order: parse error

testcase.name: enqueue_storesOrderInRedisAndAddsToReceivedZSet
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.077+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Enqueued order order-123 for branch branch-456

testcase.name: markReady_movesOrderToReadyAndNotifiesOrderService
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.083+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 marked → READY

testcase.name: acceptOrder_withNullStaffId_fallsBackToKitchenDefault
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.095+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 accepted → PREPARING

testcase.name: acceptOrder_movesOrderToPreparingAndNotifiesOrderService
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.098+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 accepted → PREPARING

testcase.name: pickupOrder_removesOrderFromQueueAndBroadcastsCompleted
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.108+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 picked up → COMPLETED

testcase.name: enqueue_withNullItems_stillSucceeds
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.120+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Enqueued order order-123 for branch branch-456

testcase.name: serveOrder_removesOrderFromQueueAndBroadcastsCompleted
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.122+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 served → COMPLETED

testcase.name: markReady_whenOrderServiceFails_throws502
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.126+01:00 ERROR 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Failed to update order order-123 status to READY in order-service: timeout

testcase.name: serveOrder_withNullNotes_usesDefaultServedMessage
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.129+01:00 INFO 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Order order-123 served → COMPLETED

testcase.name: acceptOrder_whenOrderServiceFails_throws502
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.134+01:00 ERROR 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Failed to update order order-123 status to PREPARING in order-service: Connection refused

testcase.name: pickupOrder_whenOrderServiceFails_throws502
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-10T11:35:24.137+01:00 ERROR 76561 --- [kitchen-service] [ main] c.m.k.service.KitchenQueueServiceImpl : Failed to update order order-123 status to COMPLETED in order-service: timeout
